member.name: M:GTA.UI.TextElement.GetStringWidth(System.String,GTA.UI.Font,System.Single)
member.summary: Measures how many pixels in the horizontal axis the string will use when drawn
member.param: The string of text to measure.

The
of the textu to measure.
Sets a sclae value for increasing or decreasing the size of the text, default value 1.0f - no scaling.
member.returns: The amount of pixels scaled on a 1280 pixel width base
